title: Run stabilized optimizer on Medication Review: Dosage
description: Launch the Medication Review: Dosage optimizer with the stabilized cycle-control behavior using the direct CLI path. Use the current dosage optimizer baseline shape: 180-day feedback window, 100 feedback items, 100-sample regression dataset, and 20 max iterations.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Reviewing recent Medication Review: Dosage optimizer history from the repo-local plexus-score-optimizer skill and direct CLI evidence. Next step is to inspect recent procedure records/logs for SelectQuote HCS Medium-Risk / Medication Review: Dosage and identify the most relevant restart point or failure mode before making changes.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Confirmed repo-local optimizer skill path is skills/plexus-score-optimizer/SKILL.md. Using its direct-CLI guardrails while investigating recent Dosage runs. Historical local log review shows an older Dosage run started from champion 72805404-4a3a-4299-afd8-90fe6026b7b2, finished after 35 cycles with winning version 5fd8ee3d-614a-4fa2-bb62-eca306cd7f44, and reported Recent AC1 0.464->0.536 plus Regression AC1 0.455->0.528. Next I am separating that historical result from the newer post-guard/normalized verification runs on 2026-04-23 so we can pick the right continuation point.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Recent Dosage optimizer evidence now separated into: (1) older 35-cycle historical run that produced current champion 5fd8ee3d-614a-4fa2-bb62-eca306cd7f44 with Recent AC1 0.464->0.536 and Regression AC1 0.455->0.528; (2) a 2026-04-23 one-cycle verification run that stayed flat at Recent/Regression AC1 0.511/0.536 and concluded contradiction-heavy labels are the blocker; (3) an active 2026-04-23 post-guard run that has already CARRIED three neutral cycles at AC1 0.536/0.536 with no net gain, plus repeated APIConnectionError noise, and is currently in cycle 4 synthesis. Strong current signal: stop expecting prompt churn to move Dosage until contradiction cleanup or a vetted deterministic slice reduces label noise and denominator ambiguity.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Stopped the active Dosage optimizer direct-CLI process on 2026-04-23 at process level. Terminated optimizer shell PID 95073 and child optimizer PID 95085; verification via pgrep shows no remaining `python -m plexus.cli procedure optimize --scorecard SelectQuote HCS Medium-Risk --score Medication Review: Dosage` process. Also cleaned up the abandoned item-ID feedback invalidation process from the earlier failed command path.
